description_long: This is a single, ripe pear with a deep reddish-purple skin and a slightly bulbous, teardrop shape. The surface is matte with a fine, speckled texture and subtle color variations, including some lighter patches and faint yellow streaks. The stem is short, brown, and slightly curved, emerging from the narrow top of the fruit. The body of the pear is plump and rounded, tapering smoothly toward the stem. There are minor blemishes and natural imperfections visible, suggesting it is a real, organic fruit. The overall appearance is fresh, with the skin intact and no major signs of decay.
description: A ripe, reddish-purple pear with a matte, speckled surface and a short brown stem. The fruit is plump, rounded, and shows minor natural blemishes.
description_view_0: The pear appears rounded and full, with the stem clearly visible at the top and a slight bulge on the left side.
description_view_1: This view shows the widest part of the pear, with the stem centered and the surface appearing smooth and evenly colored.
description_view_2: A yellowish streak is visible on the right side, with the stem slightly angled and the body showing more pronounced blemishes.
description_view_3: The left side displays a vertical yellow streak and more speckling, with the stem upright and the base of the pear rounded.
attribute_contextual_placement: stacked with other pears in a crate or displayed in a fruit basket
attribute_condition: fresh and ripe with minor blemishes
